fixture_files_snapshot..eval-fixtures/task.sh:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path

path = Path("src/google/adk/agents/config_schemas/AgentConfig.json")
text = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
path.write_text(
    text.replace('"title": "AgentRefConfig"', '"title": "AgentReferenceConfig"', 1),
    encoding="utf-8",
)
PY

agent_output: Done. Added `schema["title"] = "AgentReferenceConfig"` right before the file write in `scripts/generate_agent_config_schema.py`, so whenever the schema is regenerated the title will be patched in place for the YAML validator.
